title: dolichos tenuis
intro: Dolichos tenuis, also known as Horse Gram or Hurali, is a type of leguminous plant that belongs to the Dolichos genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Dolichos tenuis include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and support weight management. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of powder or decoction, and it is commonly consumed as a supplement or added to food products.
